# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Cache;

class WebsitePreviewController extends Controller
{
    public function show(Request $request)
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'url' => ['required', 'string'],
        ]);

        $url = trim($data['url']);

        if (!preg_match('/^https?:\/\//i', $url)) {
            $url = 'https://' . $url;
        }

        if (!filter_var($url, FILTER_VALIDATE_URL)) {
            return response()->json([
                'message' => 'Invalid URL provided.',
            ], 422);
        }

        $cacheKey = 'website_preview:' . sha1($url);

        $preview = Cache::remember($cacheKey, now()->addMinutes(15), function () use ($url) {
            $ch = curl_init();

            curl_setopt_array($ch, [
                CURLOPT_URL => $url,
                CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
                CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
                CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 5,
                CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 10,
                CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 20,
                CURLOPT_USERAGENT => 'Laravel Website Preview Bot/1.0',
                CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => true,
                CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 2,
                CURLOPT_HEADER => true,
            ]);

            $response = curl_exec($ch);

            if ($response === false) {
                $error = curl_error($ch);
                curl_close($ch);

                return [
                    'success' => false,
                    'error' => $error,
                ];
            }

            $statusCode = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
            $headerSize = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HEADER_SIZE);
            $effectiveUrl = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_EFFECTIVE_URL);

            curl_close($ch);

            $headerString = substr($response, 0, $headerSize);
            $body = substr($response, $headerSize);

            $title = null;
            $description = null;
            $image = null;

            if (preg_match('/<title[^>]*>(.*?)<\/title>/is', $body, $matches)) {
                $title = trim(html_entity_decode(strip_tags($matches[1]), ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8'));
            }

            if (preg_match('/<meta\s+name=["\']description["\']\s+content=["\'](.*?)["\']/is', $body, $matches)) {
                $description = trim(html_entity_decode($matches[1], ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8'));
            } elseif (preg_match('/<meta\s+property=["\']og:description["\']\s+content=["\'](.*?)["\']/is', $body, $matches)) {
                $description = trim(html_entity_decode($matches[1], ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8'));
            }

            if (preg_match('/<meta\s+property=["\']og:image["\']\s+content=["\'](.*?)["\']/is', $body, $matches)) {
                $image = trim(html_entity_decode($matches[1], ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8'));
            } elseif (preg_match('/<meta\s+name=["\']twitter:image["\']\s+content=["\'](.*?)["\']/is', $body, $matches)) {
                $image = trim(html_entity_decode($matches[1], ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8'));
            }

            return [
                'success' => $statusCode >= 200 && $statusCode < 400,
                'url' => $url,
                'effective_url' => $effectiveUrl,
                'status_code' => $statusCode,
                'title' => $title,
                'description' => $description,
                'image' => $image,
                'body' => $body,
                'headers' => $headerString,
            ];
        });

        if (empty($preview['success'])) {
            return response()->json([
                'message' => $preview['error'] ?? 'Unable to fetch website preview.',
            ], 422);
        }

        return response()->json($preview);
    }
}
